use_cases: Trigger form submissions with styled button variants
Provide primary and secondary action buttons in UI
Create accessible buttons with keyboard navigation support
Support composition pattern via asChild prop for flexible rendering
Implement themed button styles with consistent visual language
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition support and class-variance-authority for scalable variant management. Features standard Tailwind styling with shadows and rounded corners for consistent UI patterns.
